entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `decibels` REAL NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_noise_readings_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_noise_readings_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp`)
